expected_tasks.summary: Deliver finalised Q2 product spec doc to leadership@karman.in by Mon May 4 — Aditi committed in her own outbound email on Apr 30. Today is Fri May 1, so deadline is 3 days out; surface 24h ahead (Sunday) or by Monday morning.
Send Mira's birthday photo album to Priya by Sun May 3 — Aditi committed in her own outbound email on Apr 30. Surface 24h ahead (Saturday).

expected_skips.summary: Dad's forwarded insurance-renewal email is an admin/finance reminder from a family sender — not a self-made commitment by Aditi. Belongs to finance agent. Must NOT be reframed as 'Deliver insurance renewal by next week' or 'Follow up with dad on insurance'.
Mom's relational check-in ('Hope you are eating well') is inbound, contains no Aditi-made commitment. Replying belongs to email_triage. Must NOT be reframed as 'Follow up with mom' commitment.
HR Labor Day holiday FYI is a pure announcement — no Aditi commitment, no deliverable, no deadline. Must NOT be turned into any todo.
Karan's email 'Let me know if you are up for it' is an inbound coordination message, not a self-made Aditi commitment. Replying is email_triage. Must NOT be reframed as 'Follow up with Karan on 1:1'.
expected_skips.notes: From mailbox, msg dated 2026-04-28. Tempting because it has a 'let me know' phrasing, but the speaker is Karan, not the user.

expected_skips.summary: Profile mentions Aditi 'always files reimbursement claims at work last-minute' as a drop-tendency. This is a pattern, not a deadline. Must NOT manufacture a 'Deliver April reimbursements' todo with no email/calendar source.

Profile mentions 'annual checkup is overdue' as a stated drop-tendency. No email/calendar trigger exists in the slice. Must NOT manufacture a 'Send to doctor for appointment' or 'Follow up on annual checkup' todo from profile narrative alone.

personas.notes: STEADY-STATE Friday 2026-05-01. Slice now contains TWO outbound commitments from Aditi (Q2 spec to leadership due Mon, Mira's photos to Priya due Sun) PLUS the same lane-bleed temptations (dad insurance, mom check-in, HR holiday, Karan 1:1, profile-only patterns). Agent should surface 2 tasks AND skip 6 traps.

Mitali's Sunday breakfast suggestion is inbound, no Arjun commitment. Replying is email_triage. Must NOT be reframed as 'Follow up with Mitali on Sunday breakfast' as a commitment todo.

personas.expected_preference_topics_note: BACKFILL with two outbound commitments now visible. The cleanest pattern to mine is the art-business commitment cadence (price lists to collectors and galleries with date-bound promises).

expected_skips.summary: Nilesh's inbound 'Final review of FY25 Audit — discuss tomorrow?' email is NOT itself a Devendra commitment. The agent may surface a task ONLY when grounded in Devendra's outbound reply (msg_devendra_audit_out) — not from the inbound message in isolation. Surfacing a Nilesh-meeting-prep / 'Reply to Nilesh' task would still be a lane bleed.
Airtel and Torrent Power monthly bills are finance-domain reminders — no Devendra commitment, no self-made deliverable. Must NOT be reframed as 'Deliver Airtel payment by 20th'.

expected_preference_topics: Devendra reliably commits to FY-audit deliverables to his partner Nilesh with explicit dates
personas.expected_preference_topics_note: BACKFILL with two outbound commitments visible (audit comments to Nilesh + checkup booking to Hetal). Audit-deliverable cadence is the cleaner pattern; the personal-health overdue is a one-off, not a pattern.

personas.notes: Profile-only persona — no Gmail/Calendar access granted. Empty mailbox + empty fixture + empty calendar. Correct behaviour is total silence: 0 tasks, 0 preference_updates. Even though the profile is rich with commitment-style narrative, there is no email/calendar source to mine. The todos agent's commitments require an email or calendar source — profile alone is not sufficient. This persona stays as the silence test case.
